name: AXN Resolution Map — Zenodo DOI to Alexanarch AXN
description: Machine-readable resolution from purged Zenodo DOIs (terminated 2026-06-19) to sovereign Alexanarch AXNs. Includes concept (family-root) DOIs resolved to their surviving version deposits: concept-DOI severance destroyed the root structure binding versions together, not the archival material. The AXN's six-emoji glyph is the content-checksum. Canonical: https://alexanarch.org/data/doi-resolution-index.json
